name: Altiostar Networks, Inc. (Acquired by Rakuten Group, Inc.)
h1: Altiostar Networks's GCC footprint in India
lede: Altiostar Networks runs one capability center in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering it, built over fourteen years.
insight: A single Altiostar Networks center is easy to miss and easier to misread. We track its type, functions and the people who run it, so you can decide if it belongs on your target list.
metaTitle: Altiostar Networks GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Altiostar Networks runs 1 verified GCC center in Bengaluru, covering it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Altiostar Networks's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning it. The centers deliver IT and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twelve decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Altiostar Networks operate in India?
faq.a: Altiostar Networks operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Altiostar Networks have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Altiostar Networks's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Altiostar Networks run in India?
faq.a: Altiostar Networks runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Altiostar Networks's India GCCs?
faq.a: Altiostar Networks's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Altiostar Networks's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 12 leaders at Altiostar Networks's India centers, across Finance and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
